Unresolved dependencies: a struct field and a provider parameter.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

type Missing struct{}

type Dep struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewDep(m *Missing) *Dep { return &Dep{} }

type Handlers struct {
	Dep  *Dep
	Also *Missing
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:10:13: no provider for *web.Missing
  help: add a //fabrik:provider returning *web.Missing
error: web/web.go:14:2: no provider for *web.Missing (field Also of web.Handlers)
  help: add a //fabrik:provider returning *web.Missing
